name: Aisyah R.
quote: The warmth and kindness here is unmatched. Noor Shida made me feel like family on my first visit.

name: Jason T.
quote: Best pistachio croissant in KL, hands down. Flaky, nutty, not too sweet. Perfect with their butterscotch latte.

name: Nadia K.
quote: Beautiful ambience, fresh pastries, and the matcha strawberry latte is dangerously good. A bit pricey but you taste the difference.
